name: golang-github-google-go-querystring-dev
title: golang-github-google-go-querystring-dev
summary: library for encoding structs into URL query parameters
description:
library for encoding structs into URL query parameters
go-querystring is Go library for encoding structs into URL query
parameters. go-querystring is designed to assist in scenarios where
you want to construct a URL using a struct that represents the URL
query parameters.
.
This package contains the Go development library.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-google-go-querystring-dev because library for encoding structs into URL query parameters.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-google-go-querystring-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-google-go-querystring-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-google-go-querystring-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
